heading: Limitation on amount of balance with any depository institution without access to Federal Reserve advances
label: 463 Limitation on amount of balance with any depository institution without access to Federal Reserve advances
text: No member bank shall keep on deposit with any depository institution which is not authorized to have access to Federal Reserve advances under section 347b of this title a sum in excess of 10 per centum of its own paid-up capital and surplus.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original a reference to section 10(b) of this Act, meaning section 10(b) of the Federal Reserve Act. Section 10(b) of that Act was renumbered section 10B by , , , without a corresponding amendment to this section.Section 347b of this titlePub. L. 102–242, title I, § 142(a)(2)105 Stat. 2279Dec. 19, 1991
